title: Pink Butterfly Decorative Window Film, 43x100cm, Static Cling, PVC, UV Protection, 1 Count
features: 🌈️【Package Included】You will receive 1 Pieces frosted window films, The size is 43x100 cm/16.93x39.37 inch; It's can be easily cut to any size or shape waht you want, making a unique decor

🌈️【Semi-Private Protection】This semi-private window film provides partial privacy to help obscures passerby and neighbors peeps,but still allows natural light in and won't make your room dark at all, preventing furniture from fading and aging against directly exposed to sunlight

🌈【Decorative Film】This Colorful window privacy film not only enhance the look of your windows but also create a magical rainbow effect when the sunlight hits,Help you to build an exquisite stained glass appearance, greatly enhance the decoration of your home.

🌈【Reusable Mateiral】Made of Frosted PVC Material,No Glue, super static cling, Simply peel off the back, spray water, and easily stick it to your Windows for lasting durability and reusable, leaving no residue after removal.

🌈【Wide Application】The window privacy film rejects 90% of UV rays and blocks Heat, Suitable for smooth and clean glass surfaces in bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, balconies, offices, Rent House, hotels, etc
description: Want to add some personality to your home decor? Our Yangshine window privacy film is a versatile solution to keep your home safe and protected from unwanted attention without compromising natural light. Reduce Furniture Fading and Aging: Privacy window film stained glass while blocking 80% of UV rays for you and your family, it can also protect your skin and furniture from direct sunlight,And it's can reduces glare and heat transfer, Warm in winter and cool in summer,making your personal space a comfortable zone and enjoying The most complete family life; Easy to Install: You can apply this removable privacy film in minutes without any hassle simply cut to size, spray enough water, stick the glass film, and lastly flatten it out! It adheres securely to the surface and can be easily removed without leaving any residue. Multifuncational: Prevent bird strikes,Privacy Protection & Glare Reduction,Protecting your skin & eyes, preventing furniture from fading and aging against directly exposed to sunlight. Meanwhile, the window clings help filter out 45-85% sunlight heat in summer to save your electric bill.
